_meta.book_def: book = first-time SC bookings (patient's first-ever episode, reschedules collapsed, online excluded) — the city-head '1st Time Bookings'. bookall = all episodes (new + returning). done = first-time episodes completed.
_meta.source: fetch_drops_bookings.sql episodes (book/bookall/done) · data_diagnostic (doctor-days) · data_leads (leads) · data_roster (avail hrs)
